name: io.github.jeff-nasseri/mikrotik-mcp
description: MCP server for MikroTik routers: firewall, NAT, routing, DHCP, DNS, WireGuard and more via SSH.

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_HOST
environmentVariables.description: IP address or hostname of the MikroTik router

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: SSH username for the MikroTik router (default: admin)

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: SSH password for the MikroTik router

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_PORT
environmentVariables.description: SSH port of the MikroTik router (default: 22)

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_KEY_FILENAME
environmentVariables.description: Path to SSH private key file for key-based authentication

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_SECURITY__PROMPT_INJECTION_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable optional LLM Guard prompt-injection scanning (requires the security extra). Default: false

environmentVariables.name: MIKROTIK_SECURITY__PROMPT_INJECTION_THRESHOLD
environmentVariables.description: Prompt-injection detection threshold from 0.0 to 1.0. Default: 0.5
